note: V11 banner FIX (main) — Phase 2 lottery economics wording corrected. Previous banner said '50% of the protocol-side allocation' which was numerically ambiguous: protocol-side = Gold 25% + PoPC 25% = 50% of block reward, so '50% of protocol-side' could read as 25% of block reward. The actual rule is that on triggered blocks the FULL protocol-side allocation (Gold + PoPC, together 50% of the block reward) is redirected to lottery / pending — the PoW miner's 50% share is never touched. Banner now says 'the full protocol-side allocation … 50% of the block reward'. main and v11-phase2 are aligned at v89 for this clarification. No consensus behaviour change — V11_PHASE2_HEIGHT remains INT64_MAX and Phase 2 has no activation date. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
